release_notes: Fix: temperature still not showing before MV entry. Root cause: TEMP_LOGIC instructed GPT to flag the temp as 'Preliminary — recalculate after MV is confirmed' when MV was unknown, so GPT was writing that exact phrase into the template AND returning null in the preliminary_temp field. Rewrote TEMP_LOGIC and the scoring-prompt rule to explicitly forbid the 'Preliminary' wording and require a concrete Hot/Warm/Cold/Nurture/Throwaway pick based on motive + timeline + AP + listing openness — regardless of MV. Added a belt-and-suspenders scrubber that post-processes the template to strip any 'Preliminary — recalculate…' text if GPT ever slips through.
